kirundi.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Ugurura mikoro yawe unayigerageze! Nurangiza, fyonda "Uzuza."
kirundi.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: Injana y'imvugo yawe. Ubuhagarike bw'ijwi buzamuka = ibibazo, bumanuka = imvugo, ihindagurika = gushimangira.
kirundi.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Isesengura uburyo bwo guhagarara, guhamya kw'umuvuduko w'inyuguti, n'uko ijwi rihamye kugira ngo ikore amanota y'ubuhanga. Fata vyibura amasegonda 10 y'imvugo, hanyuma ufyonde "Sesengura ubuhanga."
kirundi.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Igaragaza amajwi y'inyajwi zawe ku kadirali k'inyajwi ka IPA hakoreshejwe isesengura rya formant (F1/F2). Vuga inyajwi kandi urabe akadomo kegera kugira ngo kerekane aho inyajwi yawe igwa. Uburyo bw'inzira bugaragaza guhindukira kw'inyajwi ebyiri!
kirundi.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Uduziga twicatsi = ahantu h'inyajwi hagamijwe. Akadomo k'icunga = inyajwi yawe y'ubu. Inzira y'umuhengeri = guhindukira kw'inyajwi kwa vuba.
kirundi.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Ifatwa ribikwa mu buryo bwikora iyo uhagaritse mikoro. Bisubiremo hamwe n'inyandiko y'injana ihuje. Amafatwa 3 ya nyuma abikwa.
kirundi.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: Nta fatwa rirahaba. Ugurura kandi uhagarike mikoro kugira ngo ubike ifatwa.
kirundi.select_first_recording_to_compare: Toranya ifatwa rya mbere kugira ngo ugereranye
kirundi.select_second_recording_to_compare: Toranya ifatwa rya kabiri kugira ngo ugereranye
kirundi.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Toranya ubwoko bw'umwitozo. Igikoresho kizaguha interuro zo kwitoza hamwe n'igisubizo c'injana mu gihe nyaco.
kirundi.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Vuga iyi nteruro n'irangamutima riri hasi. Raba uko ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe n'ijwi bihinduka!
kirundi.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Vuga amagambo amwe nk'imvugo (ubuhagarike bw'ijwi bumanuka ku iherezo) na nk'ikibazo (ubuhagarike bw'ijwi buzamuka). Raba itandukaniro ku igishushanyo c'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi!
kirundi.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: Interuro imwe isigura ibintu bitandukanye bitewe n'ijambo ushimangira. Toranya ijambo hasi, hanyuma uvuge interuro ushimangira iryo jambo.
kirundi.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Soma igika kiri hasi ku muvuduko ugamijwe. Igipimo c'umuvuduko kizakwereka uko ugenda vuba!
kirundi.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Uburyo bw'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi bugamijwe (agace k'icatsi = kigamijwe, icunga = ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe):
kirundi.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Vuga interuro ubu! Gerageza guhuza n'agace k'icatsi kagamijwe.
kirundi.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: Abaganga b'imvugo bakoresha uburyo bw'injana bwihariye nk'intego z'ubuvuzi. Toranya uburyo kugira ngo urabe umurongo w'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ugamijwe unawitoze kubuhuza.
kirundi.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Itoze kuvuga mu rurimi urwo ari rwo rwose! AI izakora urugero rw'interuro, hanyuma wowe ugerageze guhuza injana yayo.
kirundi.or_type_any_language: Canke andika ururimi urwo ari rwo rwose:
kirundi.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Igishushanyo co kugereranya injana kigaragaza umukururo w'urugero n'umukururo w'imvugo yawe bishizwe hejuru ya kimwe
kirundi.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Incamake y'igihe cawe co kwitoza. Sangiza umuganga wawe w'imvugo!
kirundi.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Siba amakuru yose y'igihe utangure bushasha
kirundi.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Subira ku rutonde rw'ibikoresho vya STEM Lab
kirundi.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Kugaragaza injana y'imvugo ku myitozo yasabwe n'umuganga w'imvugo
kirundi.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Gukurikirana ubuhagarike bw'ijwi mu gihe nyaco + igipimo c'ijwi + ikibara amagambo yuzuza. Abavugizi batojwe bahindura ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ~30% mu nteruro; iyerekana rirambuye ritakaza ubwitondere bw'umuteze amatwi mu ~masegonda 20.
kirundi.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Intego y'umuvuduko ~amagambo 150/umunota. Guhagarara hagati y'ivyiyumviro (amasegonda 1-2) bifite uburemere bungana n'amagambo. Banza usome ivyo wanditse mu ijwi riranguruye; interuro zidasobanutse zigaragara ako kanya.
kirundi.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Umuvuduko w'imvugo utandukanye cane bitewe n'ururimi: Icesipanyoli + Ikiyapani ~ivyunguti 7/isegonda; Icongereza ~6; Ikimandarini ~5. Umuvuduko w'amakuru urahamye hafi ya — indimi ziremereye zivugwa buhoro.
kirundi.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Umuvuduko, urwego rw'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi, ubwinshi bw'amagambo yuzuza, igihe co guhagarara — buri kimwe gihabwa amanota ugereranyije n'intego zishigikiwe n'ubushakashatsi. Fyonda ku gipimo ico ari co cose kugira ngo ubone isoko + impanuro y'ubwigishe.
kirundi.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Injana — menya uko iyerekana rikora ibisobanuro
kirundi.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Hindura ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi, umuvuduko, no kongera ijwi, hanyuma wandike ivyo ubona. Nta manota, nta vyahishuwe — kora iciyumviro cawe ku mpamvu imvugo nyinshi za TED ziri hafi y'amagambo 150/umunota.
kirundi.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Isanzwe ku mvugo nyinshi. Injana karemano.
kirundi.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Hindura ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi, umuvuduko, ijwi. Igabanya ryihariye rya tempo 4. Nta manota, nta vyahishuwe.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Iciyumviro: Umuvuduko ugira ingaruka ki ku kumva kw'abateze amatwi?
kirundi.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Imvugo nyinshi za TED ni ~amagambo 150/umunota. Rondera impamvu.
kirundi.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Sigura uko injana ikora ingaruka z'ubuvugizi.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Icitonderwa c'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cihariye ca tempo 4; nta manota y'iyerekana; nta vyahishuwe — ku bushake.
kirundi.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: Iki gikoresho cagenewe nk'igikorwa co mu ishure c'Urwego rwa 1. Ku buvuzi bw'imvugo bw'umuntu ku giti cye, nyamuneka gisha impanuro umuganga w'imvugo wemewe.
kirundi.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Kugaragaza gukoresha kumenya ubuhagarike bw'ijwi bwa Web Audio API (isano-bwite) n'isesengura ry'ubugari. Gutunganya kose gukorwa mu buryo bw'aho muri murondera — nta jwi rifatwa canke ryoherezwa.
